titleStmt.title: SII 34.125: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 125. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Piplikēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman Rājarāja I, 24th year = A.D. 1009.
Two sisters related to a vēṭkōvaṉ called Marudaṉ Paṭṭapirāṉ endowed a sum of 7.5 kaḻañju of gold to the hill temple of Tiruveṟumbiyūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tirumakaḷ pōla perunilacce
lviyuntaṉakkē Urimai pūṇṭamai mana
koḷa kāntaḷūr cālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi
vēṅkai nāṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyunuḷa
mpapāṭiyun taṭikaipāṭiyu kuṭa
malai nāṭuṅ kollamuṅ kali
ṅkamu meṇṭicai pukaḻtara vīḻama
ṇṭalamu milaṭṭapāṭi Ēḻarai Ila
kkamu tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟi taṇṭāl
koṇṭu taṉṉeḻil vaḷar Ūḻiyu
ḷellāyāṇṭu toḻutakai viḷaṅ
kumiyāṇṭē ceḻunaraittēcu kōḷ
śrīkōvirājarāja kēcaripanmarāṉa śrī
rājarājadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 24āva
tu teṉkarai pāṇṭikulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyam śrīkaṇṭa catu
rvvedimaṅkalattu tiruveṟumpiyūr malaiyāḷvārkku
teṉkarai nittaviṉōta vaḷanāṭṭu kiḷāṟ kūṟṟu perumila
ṭṭūr vēṭkōvaṉ marutaṉ paṭṭapirāṉ muṉ Ēṟa
nampi Ammaiyum vivaḷ ḷōṭuṭap piṟanta cāyā tēviyum Ivviruvōm vaicca
poṉ 7(1/2) Ivveḻukaḻañcarai poṉṉu midevar tirukkōyiluṭaiyarkaḷ vacam kuṭutti
Digital edition of SII 34.125 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
